Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 32 

CTZNSHP_VRFCTN_PENDG_IND 

LABEL: Beneficiary is Enrolled Pending Citizenship Verification — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates the beneficiary is enrolled in Medicaid pending citizenship verification; most recent in the 
calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: CTZNSHP_VRFCTN_PENDG_IND 

LONG NAME: CTZNSHP_VRFCTN_PENDG_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE
